name: What evidence do I need for my work injury claim in Idaho?

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for my work injury claim in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report details, medical records, witnesses, and forms.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Key evidence includes your detailed report (how/when/where), medical records, witness statements, and Form filings.[3][4] Prompt reporting strengthens proof of work-relatedness.[4] Key factors: Doctor's Form 123 (Utah equivalent); employer First Report; photos or incident logs.[2][4] Practical guidance: Collect everything immediately, help file reports if employer delays, and keep appointment records. Lawyers organize evidence to counter denials.

description: Report details, medical records, witnesses, and forms.[4]
